name: mcp-gtm-suite
description: The full Mamba Labs GTM Suite in one MCP server: 11 account-intelligence tools spanning the go-to-market workflow. Resolve company identity, enrich firmographics, map social presence, resolve LinkedIn URLs; detect hiring, tech-stack, job-board, funding/press, and change-event signals; aggregate them and score ICP fit. Each tool wraps a Mamba Labs Apify actor and returns flat, Clay-ready JSON.

apify_token.title: Apify API Token
apify_token.description: Apify API token for running the actors that back each tool
